description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust slide and a textured grip for secure handling. The frame is angular with ergonomic contours, and the trigger guard is generously sized, allowing for gloved use. The slide has serrations at the rear for improved manipulation, and the sights are equipped with high-visibility dots for quick target acquisition. The barrel is of standard length, with a visible muzzle opening and no external threading or compensators. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, contributing to a streamlined profile, and there are no visible engravings or logos on the slide.
description: A matte black, semi-automatic handgun with a textured grip, angular frame, and high-visibility sights. The design is modern and streamlined, with a flat magazine base and no visible slide markings.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed from the rear, showing the rear sight with two green dots and the back of the slide and grip.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full profile, including the textured grip, trigger, slide serrations, and accessory rail under the barrel.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the muzzle opening, front sight, and the overall width of the slide and barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the slide, grip, trigger guard, and hammer, mirroring the left side but with different control placements.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured with a slight palm swell and features a textured, stippled surface for enhanced traction. It appears to be made of polymer, with subtle ergonomic shaping to fit the hand comfortably. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large and rounded, with a smooth, thick profile that provides ample space for finger placement. It lacks undercuts or squared-off edges and does not feature any visible texturing or reinforcement, maintaining a simple and functional design.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length and has a smooth, non-threaded profile with a visible muzzle opening. There are no compensators, ports, or external markings, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, with only the rear serrations providing visual detail.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests. It has a simple, squared-off design with no visible logos or texturing.
